skills.name: Hakka Poa
skills.description: Hold an attacking stance shout, granting yourself with a [Enrage] buff. Increases final damage dealt with Hakkapeliter during [Enrage] buff.
skills.effect_text:
Hakkapeliter skill Final Damage increases by CaptionRatio %
Duration: 30 minutes

skills.name: Spaning
skills.description: Look around and apply [Espial] buff to you. Movement Speed increases and lets you dash during the [Espial] buff.

skills.name: Blosa
skills.description: Fire flare bullet to the target and apply [Expose] debuff.
skills.effect_text:
Skill Factor: SkillFactor % x 5
[Expose] debuff
- Search nearby enemy under Stealth
- Applies Hakkapeliter skill Accuracy + CaptionRatio %
- Duration: 10 seconds

skills.name: Ankle Shot
skills.description: Aim at the target's leg or ankle and fire your pistol. Decreases attacked target's Movement Speed for 10 seconds.
skills.effect_text:
SkillFactor: SkillFactor % x 4
Decreases Movement Speed by 20%

skills.name: Trooper Charge
skills.description: Check Fire and rush towards the target, pushing away to damage the enemy in the way.
skills.effect_text:
Skill Factor: SkillFactor % x 1~7
AoE Attack Ratio: SkillSR

skills.name: Infinite Assault
skills.description: Continuously fire at the target during channeling. When the target is not within 150 range, another enemy is targeted.
skills.effect_text:
Skill Factor: SkillFactor % per 0.25 seconds
Maximum Duration: 5 seconds

attributes.name: Hakkapeliter: Starr
attributes.description: * Decreases your Accuracy by 15%, but increases Pistol damage by the value of [Decreased Accuracy]

attributes.name: Ankle Shot: Rush
attributes.description:
* Moves fast when the Ankle Shot is accurately hit to the enemy

* Moves to the direction you've entered or where you moved before

attributes.name: Spaning: Rest
attributes.description: * [Espial] buff recovers HP as your HP Recovery periodically when moving, instead of the original effect

attributes.name: Blosa: Enhance
attributes.description: * Increases the skill factor of [Blosa] by 0.5% per attribute level* +10% added increase at maximum level

attributes.name: Ankle Shot: Enhance
attributes.description: * Increases the skill factor of [Ankle Shot] by 0.5% per attribute level. +10% added increase at maximum level

attributes.name: Trooper Charge: Enhance
attributes.description: * Increases the skill factor of [Trooper Charge] by 0.5% per attribute level. +10% added increase at maximum level

attributes.name: Infinite Assault: Enhance
attributes.description: * Increases the skill factor of [Infinite Assault] by 0.5% per attribute level. +10% added increase at maximum level

attributes.name: Hakkapeliter: Heida
attributes.description:
* Sub attack of C key is changed when [One-handed Sword] is equipped

　- Upon use, you can temporarily block enemy's Physical, Missile attack

* You can also block enemy's Physical, Missile attack while using the Trooper Charge skill

attributes.name: [Arts] Hakkapeliter: Strategic Shuffle
attributes.description:
* [Enrage] or [Enrage] buff is applied automatically according to the presence of enemy

　 - [Enrage] buff is applied when there is an enemy

　 - [Espial] buff is applied when there is no enemy

* Buff won't be applied even when the conditions are met if you're not mounted or the skill is not learned.

* Previous [Enrage] or [Espial] buff is removed when you ON/OFF the attribute

attributes.name: [Arts] Hakkapeliter: Strategic Shuffle
attributes.description:
* [Enrage] or [Enrage] buff is applied automatically according to the presence of enemy

　 - [Enrage] buff is applied when there is an enemy

　 - [Espial] buff is applied when there is no enemy

* Buff won't be applied even when the conditions are met if you're not mounted or the skill is not learned.

* Previous [Enrage] or [Espial] buff is removed when you ON/OFF the attribute

attributes.name: [Arts] Blosa: Enhanced Upgrade
attributes.description: * Increases the Skill Factor of [Blosa] by 1.25% per attribute level

attributes.name: [Arts] Ankle Shot: Enhanced Upgrade
attributes.description: * Increases the Skill Factor of [Ankle Shot] by 1.25% per attribute level

attributes.name: [Arts] Trooper Charge: Enhanced Upgrade
attributes.description: * Increases the Skill Factor of [Trooper Charge] by 1.25% per attribute level

attributes.name: [Arts] Infinite Assault: Enhanced Upgrade
attributes.description: * Increases the Skill Factor of [Infinite Assault] by 1.25% per attribute level
